name: no_agent_identity_allows
description: No CLAUDE_AGENT_ID means direct user session — allow everything

name: agent_with_no_permissions_allows
description: Agent defined but no permissions file — fail-open

name: permission_fail_mode_warn
description: When permission_fail_mode=warn, denied actions should still exit 0

name: permission_fail_mode_block
description: When permission_fail_mode=block, denied actions should exit 2
